g.text: Program.main() — builds ShopInfo(name, address, phone, hours, tagline), then new UserInterface(shop).display()
display() home loop -> 1) New Order 2) View Menu 3) About / Hours 0) Exit
orderScreen() thin header, newest-first list, running total, 1)Item 2)Drink 3)Side 4)Checkout 0)Cancel
addItem() PlateType -> Size -> addToppings(...) x5 -> Make it Hot? -> order.add(plate)
addToppings<E>() generic; meat auto-advances at Size.meatSlots; max 5 per option
viewMenuScreen() lists all 7 categories w/ prices aboutScreen() banner + shop story
checkout() order summary (colorizeHot -> red) -> ReceiptWriter on Confirm
helpers: printBigBanner . printContactBlock . printTagline . printHeader(thin) . waitForEnter
Topping implementations — one class per pricing rule
Max 5 of same option per plate; meat selection stops at Size.meatSlots
Enums — model/enums/ (source of truth for menu data)
Size SMALL(1)/MEDIUM(2)/LARGE(3) PlateType WHITE_RICE . JAMBALAYA . BROWN_RICE . GARLIC_RICE
MeatOption x6 PremiumToppingOption x4 RegularToppingOption x9 CondimentOption x6
IncludedSideOption x3 DrinkFlavor x7 MainSideOption x4
Banner + address/phone/hours + tagline, item list w/ subtotals, TOTAL, thank-you + FREE-drink coupon
